faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in New Hyde Park range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of drains requiring treatment. We provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees and offer free estimates for all New Hyde Park properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat drain flies in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout New Hyde Park and the surrounding Long Island areas. Our technicians typically complete drain fly treatments within 1-2 hours, with most customers seeing significant reduction in drain fly activity within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in New Hyde Park homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and plumbing fixtures. In New Hyde Park, we commonly see infestations in bathroom drains, basement floor drains, and kitchen sinks where moisture and organic matter accumulate. Older homes in the area may have additional breeding sites in unused or slow-draining pipes.

faqs.question: Are your drain fly treatments safe for New Hyde Park families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and bio-enzymatic treatments that are safe for families, pets, and the environment. Our technicians focus on eliminating breeding sites through mechanical cleaning and targeted applications, minimizing chemical use while maximizing effectiveness in your New Hyde Park home or business.
